ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MojoLauncher/MojoLauncher
Language: java
A Minecraft: Java Edition launcher, based on PojavLauncher

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
🚀 Real-world DevOps projects for aspiring engineers — Beginner to Advanced. Covers AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, and more. Hands-on learning with step-by-step guides.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OtterMind/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OtterMind/Chat2DB
Language: java
AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TeamNewPipe/NewPipe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipe
Language: java
A libre lightweight streaming front-end for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
Language: java
NewPipe's core library for extracting data from streaming sites

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
Language: java
🔥 官方推荐 🔥 RuoYi-Vue 全新 Pro 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 微信小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、数据权限、SaaS 多租户、Flowable 工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、MES、IM、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adityatandon15/Low-Level-Design-Course
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adityatandon15/Low-Level-Design-Course
Language: java
All Code of LLD Playlist

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: androidx/media
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/androidx/media
Language: java
Jetpack Media3 support libraries for media use cases, including ExoPlayer, an extensible media player for Android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/cloudstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/cloudstack
Language: java
Apache CloudStack is an opensource Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) cloud computing platform

Language: java
morphe patches for twitter

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iluwatar/java-design-patterns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iluwatar/java-design-patterns
Language: java
Design patterns implemented in Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI 低代码平台「低代码 + 零代码」双驱动！低代码可一键生成前后端代码;零代码可 5 分钟搭建系统;AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
Language: java
This repository consists of the code samples, assignments, and notes for the Java data structures & algorithms + interview preparation bootcamp of WeMakeDevs.
